mapper.select: SELECT GETBUYERDEPTNAME(BACP.GATE_CD, BACP.BUYER_CD, CVUR.DEPT_CD, 'KO') AS DEPT_NM , BACO.CTRL_NM , CVUR.USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(BACP.GATE_CD, BACP.CTRL_USER_ID, 'KO') AS USER_NM , CVUR.DUTY_NM , CVUR.POSITION_NM FROM STOCBACP BACP JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON BACP.GATE_CD = CVUR.GATE_CD AND BACP.BUYER_CD = CVUR.COMPANY_CD AND BACP.CTRL_USER_ID = CVUR.USER_ID AND CVUR.DEL_FLAG = 0 JOIN STOCBACO BACO ON BACP.CTRL_CD = BACO.CTRL_CD AND BACO.DEL_FLAG = 0 WHERE BACP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BACP.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND BACP.CTRL_CD='BR100' AND BACP.DEL_FLAG = 0
